description: Phase 35: QuantHealth - Health & Fitness App. Create apps/quanthealth/ with health dashboard, activity tracking, sleep analysis, wearable integration, nutrition tracking, and telemedicine features.
steps: Create apps/quanthealth/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/ai, fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quanthealth/tsconfig.json.
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/app.ts following createApp pattern with routes for health, fitness, nutrition, telemedicine

Create apps/quanthealth/backend/services/health-dashboard.service.ts - HealthDashboardService class: getDashboard, getHealthScore, getInsights, getHealthTrends, setHealthGoals, getGoalProgress, generateReport

Create apps/quanthealth/backend/services/activity-tracker.service.ts - ActivityTrackerService class: logActivity, getSteps, getWorkouts, startWorkout, endWorkout, getActivityHistory, getCaloriesBurned, getActiveMinutes
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/services/sleep-analysis.service.ts - SleepAnalysisService class: logSleep, getSleepScore, getSleepPatterns, getSleepStages, getRecommendations, setSleepGoal
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/services/wearable.service.ts - WearableIntegrationService class: pairDevice, syncData, getHeartRate, getSpO2, getECG, getBodyTemperature, getStress, disconnectDevice

Create apps/quanthealth/backend/services/nutrition.service.ts - NutritionService class: logMeal, searchFood, getMacros, getDailyIntake, createMealPlan, getRecipeSuggestions, setNutritionGoals, scanBarcode

Create apps/quanthealth/backend/services/telemedicine.service.ts - TelemedicineService class: bookAppointment, joinConsultation, getPrescriptions, uploadHealthRecords, getProviders, cancelAppointment, getConsultationNotes
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/routes/health.ts, routes/fitness.ts, routes/nutrition.ts, routes/telemedicine.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/__tests__/activity-tracker.service.test.ts - Tests for workout logging, step tracking, calorie computation
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/__tests__/nutrition.service.test.ts - Tests for meal logging, macro calculation, meal plans
Create apps/quanthealth/backend/__tests__/telemedicine.service.test.ts - Tests for appointment booking, consultation lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: apps/quanthealth/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
HealthDashboardService aggregates health metrics into a unified score
ActivityTrackerService tracks workouts, steps, and calories
SleepAnalysisService provides sleep stage analysis and recommendations
WearableIntegrationService syncs data from paired devices
NutritionService handles meal logging with macro tracking
TelemedicineService manages appointment lifecycle and health records
All services use zod for validation
Unit tests pass for activity, nutrition, and telemedicine
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quanthealth/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
